name: Command / Command Light
tagline: Original 4K-context Command and lighter Command Light generation models; both deprecated Sept 15, 2025 in favor of Command R / Command A.
seoTitle: Command / Command Light — Cohere LLM specs
metaDescription: Command / Command Light (Cohere) — part of the Command (legacy) line. Original 4K-context Command and lighter Command Light generation models; both deprecated…
overview: Command / Command Light is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command (legacy) line. Cohere's first-generation Command generation models, now retired.
What's notable in this version: Original 4K-context Command and lighter Command Light generation models; both deprecated Sept 15, 2025 in favor of Command R / Command A.
